description: Made an appointment for an oder, 5th jan going in.
emailed oxo tot Clarence list. ordered 6x Space saver.
mMade an order, offered Clarence oxo tot but declined. Offered new items but she said she will look at before next order. Visit 5th Jan
Wishing Sue and Liz a Merry Christmas etc. Sue has advised she will not be buying for while. They want new unique brands so will approach again with new stock.

To Rose, owner. She stocks Oxo Tot so offered clearance items etc. Have not heard from her since she payed her invoice which was 4 months overdue so now on pro forma. In the past she said she doesn't want to be on that. Next is the catch her in a store and have a chat with her.
Went into store, Pete was out. Spoke with Manager/staff. Products selling well! Trunki stand looks good, need more boy colours. They wont make an order until most of int sells though.
Meet buyer update new range list
